DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANTS GRANT KWOK AND MICHAEL KWONG'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFFS, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, IN THE AMOUNT OF $215, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.

DEFENDANTS GRANT KWOK and MICHAEL KWONG's Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond to Defendants' Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request For Production Of Documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiffs, jointly and severally, in the amount of $215, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
